caption: A man with glasses and a dark navy blue button-down shirt is positioned in front of a light-colored wall. Behind him is a large piece of wall art depicting a brown, textured vessel against a wooden background. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. In the beginning, his hands are raised and active in front of his chest, moving as he talks. As time progresses, he continues to speak with an open mouth, and his hands gradually lower and settle. The lighting remains consistent across the scenes, and the camera angle is a static medium shot focusing on the man from the chest up. No on-screen text, logos, or other people are visible in the scene.
